name: degoog-toolkit
description: SearXNG integrations, plugins, and themes for degoog.
author: SoPat712

themes.name: LiterallyGoogle
themes.description:
A Google-like theme with a sticky header and full-width above-results plugin slots.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Currency
plugins.description:
Currency converter with live rates. Triggers on !cur / !currency / !convert and on bare natural queries like '100 usd to eur'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: TMDB
plugins.description:
Shows rich info panels for movies, TV shows, and actors. Activates on explicit movie/TV/person queries and when film-site or database URLs appear in search results.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description:
Current weather with interactive charts (temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity), a 7-day forecast and configurable units (imperial by default — Fahrenheit, mph, mmHg, inch). Supports !weather <city>, leading phrases like 'weather in rome', and trailing-keyword queries like 'rome weather' or 'london forecast today'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Speedtest
plugins.description:
Internet speed test with selectable servers, latency, and a circular gauge. Supports !speed, !speedtest, !speed-test, !networkspeed, !internetspeed, and natural phrases like 'speed test' or 'how fast is internet'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Undecideds
plugins.description:
A premium multi-mode decision-making dashboard featuring Coin Flip, Roll Die, Pick Number, and Yes or No decisions.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Timer / Stopwatch
plugins.description:
Compact timer and stopwatch with smooth circular progress, editable durations, optional sound, and natural timer queries.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Reddit
plugins.description:
Shows the top Reddit post and top comments above search results.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Dictionary
plugins.description:
Shows definitions, pronunciation, synonyms, antonyms, and origin for explicit dictionary queries.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Calculator
plugins.description:
Scientific calculator with safe expression parsing, interactive keypad, and local canvas graphing for x expressions.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Stocks
plugins.description:
No-key stock quotes with server-side Yahoo Finance data, Stooq fallback, and selectable chart ranges.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Translate
plugins.description:
No-key server-side translation command with provider switching, romanization, speech, and leading natural-language triggers.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Search History
plugins.description:
Stores your past searches with timestamps and surfaces them as a dropdown on the search bar. Use !history (or natural phrases like 'search history') to view a paginated, deletable list. Entries are kept locally in data/history.json and the maximum count is configurable.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Unit Converter
plugins.description:
Unit converter for length, mass, volume, temperature, area, and speed. Supports fuzzy natural queries like '25.4oz toml' or '!unit 100c f'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Until
plugins.description:
Countdown answers for natural date queries like 'years until 3000', 'days since Christmas', 'hours until next Friday', or '!until 5pm'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: OpenStreetMap
plugins.description:
Interactive OpenStreetMap card for map and location queries.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Barrel Roll
plugins.description:
Do a barrel roll or tilt the page on matching queries.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Tip Calculator
plugins.description:
Interactive tip calculator with real-time bill split, custom slider parameters, and animations.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Color Translator
plugins.description:
Translates colors between hex, RGB/RGBA, HSL/HSLA, HSB/HSV, UIColor, and NSColor. Triggers on CSS, iOS/macOS code color formats, and named colors.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Sports Results - alpha
plugins.description:
Shows live sports scores, schedules, and standings. Activates on natural queries like team names, 'premier league standings', or 'lakers vs warriors'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

engines.description:
